title: Arrays, Dynamic Sequences, and Locality · Proof Workshop
summary: Design an event buffer with predictable indexing, insertion, and memory behavior. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of an array-backed sequence with operation traces while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain indexing and cache-local traversal from contiguous logical storage.
Trace capacity growth and amortized append behavior through resize events.
Compare indexed access, search, middle insertion, deletion, slicing, and copying costs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
